### DateAdapter

时间库适配器的类型

```typescript
export type DateAdapter<TDate extends ExtendableDateType> = AtomicDateOperationsAdapter<TDate> & {
    mergeDateAndTime: (date: TDate, time: TDate) => TDate;
    isWithinRange: (value: TDate, range: [TDate, TDate]) => boolean;
};
```
<b>参考：</b>[ExtendableDateType](#extendabledatetype) , [AtomicDateOperationsAdapter](#atomicdateoperationsadapter)
